prices.source_block:
Admission Prices
If you have a coupon, free pass, corporate admission benefit, pre-purchased ticket, library pass, EBT or WIC benefits, or any other discount to apply, please present it to the Admissions staff when you check in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit.
ONE Price for Discovery Museum and Discovery Woods
Adult: $19.00
Senior (60+): $18.00
Child: $19.00
Under 1 year old: Free
Teachers are always free!
Members: FREE Learn More

reservation.source_phrase: Note: reservations are no longer required nor accepted
reservation.source_block:
School Year Hours | End June 16
Note: reservations are no longer required nor accepted
Monday : Closed (but open select Mondays for holidays and public school vacation weeks; see monthly schedule below)
Tuesday - Sunday : 9:00am to 4:30pm
First Friday night of each month, October - June : 4:30 to 8:00pm with free admission
